  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- NetworkCommissioning\n"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码，如：\n- TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload\n"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"commandCode Field的filedCode"},"value":{"description":"参数值（推荐按对应 field 的 parameter.type 选择值类型）","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"command"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommand":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
